name: QR Code Generator API
description: Generate QR codes in <50ms — PNG/SVG/Base64, custom colors, edge-deployed. Free 500/mo. goqr.me alternative.
long_description:
## The Fastest QR Code API on RapidAPI
Generate production-ready QR codes in under 50ms from Cloudflare's 300+ edge locations. PNG, SVG, or Base64 JSON output with full color customization.

## Why This API?
- **Sub-50ms latency** from Cloudflare's global edge network
- **3 output formats**: PNG (raster), SVG (vector/print), Base64 JSON (embed in HTML without file I/O)
- **Brand colors**: Custom foreground + background hex colors
- **Error correction**: L/M/Q/H levels — H allows logo overlay on center 20%
- **No auth overhead**: Subscribe on RapidAPI and call immediately

## Real-World Use Cases
- **E-commerce**: Dynamic checkout/payment QR codes per order
- **Restaurants**: Contactless digital menu QR codes per table
- **SaaS invoices**: Embed QR codes in HTML/PDF via Base64 data_uri
- **Marketing**: Branded QR codes for flyers, posters, business cards
- **Mobile apps**: Deep link QR codes for app downloads and sharing
- **CI/CD**: Generate deployment preview QR codes in your pipeline

## Quick Start
```
GET /generate?text=https://example.com&size=400&format=png&color=FF5722
```
Returns binary PNG. Use `format=base64` for JSON with embeddable `data_uri`.

## Pricing — 97% Cheaper Than Alternatives
| Plan | Price | Requests/mo | Rate Limit |
|------|-------|-------------|------------|
| **Basic (FREE)** | $0 | 500 | 1/sec |
| Pro | $5.99 | 50,000 | 10/sec |
| Ultra | $14.99 | 500,000 | 50/sec |
| Mega | $49.99 | 5,000,000 | 100/sec |

Free tier includes all formats and colors. No credit card required.

## Alternative To
Faster and cheaper alternative to goqr.me, QR Server, QRickit, and QR Code Monkey. Same features, documented rate limits, RapidAPI support, and SLA guarantee on paid plans.

## Sample Base64 Response
```json
{"data": "iVBOR...", "data_uri": "data:image/png;base64,iVBOR...", "size": 1234}
```

endpoints.name: Generate QR Code
endpoints.description: Generate a QR code from text or URL in PNG, SVG, or Base64 format

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text or URL to encode (max 4296 chars)

parameters.name: error_correction
parameters.description: Error correction: L(7%), M(15%), Q(25%), H(30%)

endpoints.name: API Info
endpoints.description: Get API information and available parameters
